summary: Sprint 17.6 — Operation Incinerator (Burn Logs + Proof of Scarcity) — Complete E2E Testing

minor_issues.issue: Zero amount returns 422 instead of 400 (Pydantic validation)
minor_issues.impact: None - still correctly rejects zero amounts

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/transparency/stats - Returns correct locked allocations (300M Treasury + 150M Team = 450M = 45%)
✅ GET /api/transparency/stats - Math correct: effective_circulating = 1B - burned - 450M locked
✅ GET /api/transparency/stats - With zero burns: effective_circulating = 550M
✅ GET /api/transparency/burns?limit=5 - Returns empty list by default
✅ POST /api/admin/burns/disclose - Happy path with 50M burn succeeds
✅ POST /api/admin/burns/disclose - Duplicate tx_signature returns 409 (idempotency)
✅ POST /api/admin/burns/disclose - Short tx_signature (<32 chars) returns 422
✅ POST /api/admin/burns/disclose - Negative amount rejected with 422
✅ POST /api/admin/burns/disclose - announce=true fires burn_event trigger successfully
✅ GET /api/admin/burns - Returns items, count, and stats with locked allocations
✅ POST /api/admin/burns/{burn_id}/redact - Soft-deletes burn (redacted_at set)
✅ Stats after redaction - total_burned reverts to 0, effective_circulating back to 550M
✅ POST /api/admin/burns/{burn_id}/redact (double-redact) - Returns noop=true (idempotent)
✅ POST /api/admin/burns/disclose (re-disclose) - Same tx_signature can be re-disclosed after redaction
✅ Backend startup logs - '[startup] Operation Incinerator burn_logs indexes ready.'
✅ Pytest - All 33 tests in test_operation_incinerator.py pass
✅ Frontend /transparency - proof-of-scarcity-section renders with 3 metric cards
✅ Frontend /transparency - Initial supply shows 1,000,000,000
✅ Frontend /transparency - Total burned shows correct value with flame icon
✅ Frontend /transparency - Real circulating supply shows correct calculation
✅ Frontend /transparency - Tooltip trigger exists and shows disclaimer on hover
✅ Frontend /transparency - Tooltip contains '45%' and 'Real-time circulating supply' text
✅ Frontend /transparency - Inline disclaimer visible with ⚖ prefix
✅ Frontend /transparency - Inline disclaimer mentions 45% locks
✅ Frontend /transparency - Burn feed list shows burn items when present
✅ Frontend /transparency - Burn items have Solscan links (solscan.io/tx/{signature})
✅ Frontend /transparency - Empty state shown when no burns exist
✅ Admin Cabinet - cabinet-incinerator-card renders
✅ Admin Cabinet - incinerator-amount-input present
✅ Admin Cabinet - incinerator-sig-input present
✅ Admin Cabinet - incinerator-when-input present
✅ Admin Cabinet - incinerator-lang-select present
✅ Admin Cabinet - incinerator-note-input present
✅ Admin Cabinet - incinerator-announce-toggle present
✅ Admin Cabinet - incinerator-submit-btn present
✅ Admin Cabinet - incinerator-ledger-list shows burn records
✅ Admin Cabinet - incinerator-redact-{id} buttons present for each burn
✅ Admin Cabinet - Form fields can be filled and interacted with
✅ TypeScript compilation - npx tsc --noEmit passes with no errors

success_percentage.backend: 97% (30/31 tests passed - 1 minor status code difference)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (Burn disclosure → stats update → frontend display working)
